prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4ZC1-T** (1.8L turbocharged inline-4, 160 PS stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger, upgraded **HKS 264° camshafts**, and a **TODA Racing forged crankshaft** (86mm stroke) for a 2.0L stroker build, paired with **JE 8.5:1 forged pistons** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** for 350+ HP on E85 with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU**

Full **ISUZU Gemini ZZ-specific** **Cusco Type-RS** 6-point bolt-in roll cage with integrated **Sparco Pro 2000** seat mounts, **Wilwood 6-piston front calipers** (330mm rotors) and **2-piston rear calipers** (280mm rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500** pads, and a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (4.11 final drive) for drag/track use

Custom **ISUZU Gemini ZZ** **Tomei 4-2-1 exhaust manifold** (equal-length, 304 stainless) with a **SARD 70mm downpipe** and **HKS Hi-Power Spec-L** cat-back exhaust (dual 76mm tips), paired with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller and **AEM 3.5bar MAP sensor** for precise turbo spool management
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Gemini ZZ** widebody kit (FRP construction) with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 1200mm span) and **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 3kg weight reduction), all painted in **PPG Toyota Super White II (040)** with **3M Matte Black (101)** accents

**Work Meister S1 3P 15x9 +38** wheels (gunmetal finish) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052** (225/45/15) tires, with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) and **Cusco pillowball upper mounts** for aggressive stance and track alignment

**ISUZU Gemini ZZ-specific** **Recaro SP-G (Kazuki Nakajima edition)** seats in **Alcantara/Suede (Black/Red)**, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (350mm, suede), and **Defi BF Amber** gauges (boost, oil pressure, EGT) mounted in a **custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod**
